allow: PowerShell(wsl docker exec -i SQLServer2022 /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S 172.21.18.232  -U sa -P 'Adm0s4BNFS' -No -Q "IF DB_ID\('minijira'\) IS NULL CREATE DATABASE minijira; SELECT name FROM sys.databases WHERE name = 'minijira'")
PowerShell(wsl docker exec -i SQLServer2022 /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Adm0s4BNFS' -No -d minijira -Q "SELECT name FROM sys.tables ORDER BY name" -h -1 2>&1)

PowerShell(wsl docker exec -i SQLServer2022 /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Adm0s4BNFS' -No -d minijira -Q "SELECT t.name AS table_name, cc.name AS constraint_name, cc.definition FROM sys.check_constraints cc JOIN sys.tables t ON cc.parent_object_id = t.object_id ORDER BY t.name" -h -1 2>&1)

PowerShell(try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/health -TimeoutSec 5\) | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/docs -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { "DOCS_ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/health -TimeoutSec 5\) | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/docs/ -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "DOCS=$\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "DOCS_ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/openapi.json -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "OPENAPI=$\($r.StatusCode\), bytes=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "OPENAPI_ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/auth/login -Method POST -Body '{"email":"ana@empresa.com","password":"x"}' -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { $_.ErrorDetails.Message }; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/projects -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { $_.ErrorDetails.Message }; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/auth/login -Method POST -Body '{"email":"not-an-email"}' -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { $_.ErrorDetails.Message })

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/auth/login -Method POST -Body '{"email":"laura@empresa.com","password":"demo123"}' -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 5; "Login OK, user=$\($login.user.name\), tokenLen=$\($login.accessToken.Length\), roles=$\($login.roles | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; $tickets = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/projects/1/tickets -Headers @{Authorization = "Bearer $\($login.accessToken\)"} -TimeoutSec 5; "Tickets count=$\($tickets.items.Count\), hasMore=$\($tickets.hasMore\)"; $tickets.items | Select-Object id, title, status -First 3 | Format-Table)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/auth/login -Method POST -Body '{"email":"laura@empresa.com","password":"demo123"}' -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 5; $headers = @{Authorization = "Bearer $\($login.accessToken\)"; 'Content-Type' = 'application/json'}; "Login OK"; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/tickets/2/status -Method PATCH -Headers $headers -Body '{"status":"En progreso"}' -TimeoutSec 5; "Ticket #2 status=$\($r.status\), updatedAt=$\($r.updatedAt\)"; $audit = wsl docker exec -i SQLServer2022 /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Adm0s4BNFS' -No -d minijira -Q "SELECT TOP 3 ticket_id, field, old_value, new_value, actor_id FROM audit_log ORDER BY id DESC" -h -1; $audit)

PowerShell(try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5173/ -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { "FRONTEND_ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3030/api/v1/health -TimeoutSec 5\).status } catch { "BACKEND_ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
